CustomField.formula: IF(NOT(ISBLANK(Medical_Consultation_Promotion__c)), LEFT(Medical_Consultation_Promotion__r.Name, 31), IF(NOT(ISBLANK(Medication_Promotion__c)), LEFT(Medication_Promotion__r.Name, 31), IF(NOT(ISBLANK(Sexual_Wellness_Promotion__c)), LEFT(Sexual_Wellness_Promotion__r.Name, 31), IF(NOT(ISBLANK(Lab_Promotion__c)), LEFT(Lab_Promotion__r.Name, 31), IF(NOT(ISBLANK(Aesthetics_Promotion__c)), LEFT(Aesthetics_Promotion__r.Name, 31), IF(NOT(ISBLANK(Hormone_Evaluation_Promotion__c)), LEFT(Hormone_Evaluation_Promotion__r.Name, 31), NULL))))))
CustomField.label: QB Discount Name
